rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For An Order Directing Ccsf Receiver To Vacate Kbic Void Judgment In Case Number: Sc 124919.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 2, 2024 line 1. DEFENDANT JULIA MWANGI, RENKA PROP, LLC, NOZARI 2, LLC, ZORIALL, LLC, CHRISTINE MWANGI NOTICE OF MOTION FOR AN ORDER DIRECTING CCSF RECEIVER TO VACATE KBIC VOID JUDGMENT IN CASE NUMBER: SC 124919. is continued to February 9, 2024. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: DEVIN DEUTSCH ET AL VS. FELINK INVESTMENTS & PROPERTIES USA, LLC, A ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 2, 2024 line 3. rulings.Case Title: HARVEST SMALL BUSINESS FINANCE, LLC VS. ELEN MEDER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Extend Time To Respond To Verified First Amended Complaint For Ud To February 7, 24 (An Extension Of Less Than 30 Days)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 2, 2024 line 4. DEFENDANT ELEN MEDER NTC OF MTN TO EXTEND TIME TO RESPOND TO VERIFIED FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR UD TO FEBRUARY 7, 24 (AN EXTENSION OF LESS THAN 30 DAYS) is moot. Defendant's time to respond runs from the notice of entry of order on the motion denying motion to quash. No order has yet been presented to the Court for execution (hard copy to the department) and given today's date, any such order an noticed thereof will necessarily allow the Defendant to submit a response to the complaint on or after February 7, 2024 depending on the timing of execution and service. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: BEHROUZ HALALI VS. RODRIGO MENDOZA LUNA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 2, 2024 line 5. PLAINTIFF BEHROUZ HALALI PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO TAX COSTS is GRANTED in part and Hearing Required in part. Motion is granted as to the Court and e-filing fees that have been waived by the Court. Motion is granted as to the travel expenses. Hearing Required as to the court reporter's fee to clarify whether any part of the $335 invoice was for the Court reporter attendance fees as opposed to the transcript fee. To the extent any part of this amount is for anything other than the attendance fee, the Court will grant the motion as to such part. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: SO LING LEE VS. JOHN DOE WAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 2, 2024 line 7. PLAINTIFF SO LEE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER Hearing Required for Defendant's counsel to explain the setting of the motion under the discovery act for hearing on February 29, 2024 instead of setting it for a hearing per CCP 1170.8 or seeking an order shortening time/advancing for a regularly noticed motion if counsel believes that CCP 1170.8 does not apply to motions under CCP 2033.300. The trial in this action is set for February 13, 2024. =(501/REQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
